| Friend, we're so honored and excited by how many people have entered our contest to join me on the campaign trail for beers and a brewery tour.

As a former brewer, I've learned thousands of times over that sharing tales, hopes and dreams over a pint is one of the very best ways to get to know someone--and I can't wait to pour you a beer and hear your story.

**I 'd love to see your name in the mix, and the contest wraps up at midnight tonight. To be automatically entered, all you have to do is chip in any amount, even $1. Will you take a second to do that right now?** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377162b/691c9bd/6c0b4235/11a4fe17/3999997983/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-grab-a-beer-with-john?refcode=em_fr_20190520_JH_20190520-fr-JH-contestdeadlinebump-all_all_contribbutton&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Can't wait to meet you,

John No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by **May 21st, 2019**. Three (3) winners will receive the following prize: **Round trip travel to the event city, one (1) night hotel accommodations, one (1) brewery tour, and one (1) meal with drinks** (approximate retail value of prize: **$1,500**). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. All prizes will be awarded. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 21 or older. Promotion subject to [**_Official Rules_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377162b/691c9bd/6c0b4235/11a4fe12/3999997983/VEsD/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/content/have-a-beer-with-hickenlooper-contest-rules/") and additional restrictions on eligibility. What do you think it'd be like to chat on the phone with Elizabeth?

Imagine hearing "Hello, it's Elizabeth Warren!" on the other end of the line.

Imagine hearing her thank you for being in this fight -- for making our grassroots movement possible.

You might not have to imagine it.

Team,

From Aurora to Newtown to Orlando to Parkland, we've seen assault weapons devastate our communities and leave countless families to endure the unimaginable heartbreak of losing a loved one to gun violence.

And the NRA and the Members of Congress they have in their pocket will say that nothing can be done.

These horrors won't end until we stop accepting this as our new normal way of life.

Will you join me in demanding that Congress finally take action to ban assault weapons once and for all? Click here to sign the petition and make your demands heard.

These tragedies are senseless and preventable. The only reason they continue to plague our country is that lawmakers continue to kowtow to the NRA. It's time to change that.

[_**Sign your name today and demand Congress take action to ban assault weapons.**_](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dd07/693b8b0a/59dbc47c/72deb5a2/2315102951/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ban-assault-weapons/?code=markey&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmarkey-assault-weapons-ban%3Frefcode%3D052119%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dtrue&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Cory Booker
subject: I need to ask you directly: Today, will you make a donation to my campaign? This is a moment we won't get back, and I can't do this without you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team -- I'm reaching out because I need to ask you directly: [_**Will you make a donation to our campaign today?**_](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190521-em?refcode=em_fr_20190521_CB_20190521-fr-CB-directlyrsnd-activenopn_activenopn_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") There are a few big reasons why your donation matters so much right now. We recently brought on our first big round of field organizers, and these folks have spent the last few weeks organizing neighborhoods and connecting with communities in several states across the country. I can't wait to expand our ground game to more communities nationwide. Your support can help us make that happen. And in the month they've been on the ground organizing, we've seen what's at stake in this election. The Mueller Report -- even in its redacted state -- paints an undeniable picture of an administration that attempts to distract the American people by spinning the truth. And in the past few weeks, we've watched the White House do everything to resist and prevent Congress from doing its constitutional duty of oversight. And as I've traveled around this country, I've heard from Americans who feel pretty helpless about all of this. **But I assure you none of us is helpless.** As a member of the U.S. Senate, I'm doing everything in my power to make sure the people who violated the public trust are held accountable. As citizens, we all have the power -- the responsibility, even -- to make sure those who use the highest office of the land to thwart justice are never allowed to get away with it. **More than anything, these last few weeks are a stark reminder that the 2020 election is one we can 't get wrong.** We can't fail in this moment to speak with absolute moral and ethical clarity about what's right and wrong. That's why I'm running for president of the United States. And I can't do it without you. [_**Please make a donation today.**_](https://act.corybooker. ---
Peter,

Republicans across the country are ushering in extreme laws that clearly violate the right to choose that is guaranteed by the U.S. Constitution, as the Supreme Court explained in _Roe v. Wade_.

I refuse to impose my religious beliefs on other people. Women should control their own bodies -- period. An abortion should be a decision between a woman and her doctor -- period. **That is the law of the land under _Roe v. Wade_ , and it must remain the law of the land.**

[Speak out with me, Peter. Click here to sign your name and share this petition to defend _Roe v. Wade_ and a woman's right to choose.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319bcb/1cd0ac28/3c581221/356b54f2/3127570612/VEsE/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Right-to-Choose?source=email-bsd-20190521roe-b1_PET_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190521roe&utm_content=b1_PET_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")

What's going on in Alabama, Georgia, Missouri, and across this nation isn't a coincidence. Republican-led state legislatures are following the lead of President Trump and trying to end a woman's right to choose. On the campaign trail, he declared that women should be punished for having an abortion and now states are following through. He promised to overturn Roe and has appointed two Supreme Court justices to do it. These extreme laws are designed to invite the Supreme Court to overturn Roe and make abortion illegal.

**It 's on us -- all of us -- to stand up and fight for a woman's right to choose and live with dignity and equal opportunity.**

[Take action. Click here to defend _Roe v. Wade_ and a woman's right to choose.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319bcb/1cd0ac28/3c581221/356b54f2/3127570612/VEsF/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Right-to-Choose?source=email-bsd-20190521roe-b1_PET_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190521roe&utm_content=b1_PET_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")

Thanks for making your voice heard, Peter.

_Joe_

Thank you for stepping up! Our campaign wouldn’t be possible without you.
— Jose

Kamala 2020

subject: Absolutely YUGE crowds in NC, SC, GA, and AL this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
We are competing everywhere this time. And we are going to win.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1414%2E150750%2EP1Ib3d)

Friends -
[**I am writing to ask you to make an important $3 contribution before Bernie hits the stage at his homecoming rally in Vermont this weekend.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190521-1-weekend-30&t=2&akid=1414%2E150750%2EP1Ib3d)
**Here’s why this request is so important:**
In 2020, we aren’t writing off ANYTHING. Not a single state. Not a single delegate. Not a single vote. So last weekend, we went to a few states we didn’t do as well in during the last campaign.
It was AMAZING.
Thousands showed up in Asheville, North Carolina. We even needed an overflow area.
[](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190521-1-weekend-30&t=3&akid=1414%2E150750%2EP1Ib3d)
Then there was another extraordinary crowd in Augusta, Georgia on a day where the temperature was well into the 90s.
[](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190521-1-weekend-30&t=4&akid=1414%2E150750%2EP1Ib3d)
Then we visited Birmingham, Alabama – yes, Alabama – where thousands showed up to join Bernie.
[](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190521-1-weekend-30&t=5&akid=1414%2E150750%2EP1Ib3d)
_(Photo Credit: Kailani Koenig - @kailanikm)_
**Now this weekend we are having a homecoming rally in Vermont — one that we hope will be big. And before Bernie hits the stage, we’re trying to generate as many individual donations as we possibly can. This is important:**
[**Please make a $3 contribution to our campaign before Bernie’s homecoming rally in Vermont this weekend. We’re going to compete everywhere in 2020. If you’re with us, we’re going to win.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190521-1-weekend-30&t=30&akid=1414%2E150750%2EP1Ib3d)
Some of our opponents may be able to raise almost $1 million a night at fancy fundraisers. And we are damn sure there will be more corporate-funded outside organizations attacking us and our issues.
But we have the people with us; that is clear. And if we keep fighting, we are going to win this race and transform this country.
All my best,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager
* * *
**Make a $3 contribution before Bernie’s homecoming rally in Vermont this weekend. We’re aiming for a massive number of individual donations before he hits the stage. This is important.**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190521-1-weekend-30&t=31&akid=1414%2E150750%2EP1Ib3d)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=32&akid=1414%2E150750%2EP1Ib3d). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=33&akid=1414%2E150750%2EP1Ib3d). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=34&refcode2=1414_150750_P1Ib3d&akid=1414%2E150750%2EP1Ib3d).

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Delaying Approval of New Trade Deal Hurts American Workers, Families and the Economy
body:
"The U.S. will be losing out on more jobs, more customers for Made-in-America goods and a stronger economy unless the U.S. House of..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=50209d18ea&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Delaying Approval of New Trade Deal Hurts American Workers, Families and the Economy**

“The U.S. will be losing out on more jobs, more customers for Made-in-America goods and a stronger economy unless the U.S. House of Representatives takes up the updated trade agreement with Mexico and Canada,” Reps. Kevin Brady (R-TX) and Steve Scalise (R-LA) write in _The Hill_.

“After years of stagnation America’s economy is growing 50 percent faster than earlier projected. Paychecks are rising, especially among blue-collar and low-income workers. America’s manufacturing is back. And jobs and investment are flowing back into the U.S. from overseas. Delaying USMCA means fewer economic benefits to hard working Americans.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5d67277acf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Americans’ confidence in the U.S. job market is the highest in Gallup’s trend originating in 2001, with 71% in May saying now is a good time to find a quality job,” Lydia Saad reports for [Gallup](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1bca7fc030&e=3ee4985eea). “The longer-term picture shows that Americans' positive perceptions of both the economy and the job market are substantially improved today over the prior decade.”
---
|
---
| “Comprehensive new state-level data from the [National Association of Manufacturers](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1a6bac5507&e=3ee4985eea) shows the USMCA’s positive impact, and manufacturers are voicing their support for this deal,” Andrew Clark writes. “As manufacturers’ most critical partners, Canada and Mexico purchase one-fifth of the total value of U.S. manufacturing output – more than the next 11 countries combined. These exports support about 2 million American manufacturing jobs and 43,000 small- and medium-sized businesses.”
---
|
---
| Last week, President Trump offered a blueprint for resolving a crisis that “has reduced the border to a mere speed bump for the masses clamoring to get in,” _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=21863fdcaf&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “At a time when science can calculate the weight of every element in the known universe, down to the tiniest atom, official Washington cannot come up with an accurate number of illegal immigrants residing within the nation’s borders . . . Bringing order to immigration chaos will assure a better future for citizens and immigrants alike.”
---
|
---
| “Attorney General Bill Barr traveled to El Salvador this week with the goal of protecting Americans from dangerous gang members crossing the border into our country,” Rep. Vern Buchanan (R-FL) writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dc3dec29f4&e=3ee4985eea). “Americans are victim to the violence emanating from the MS-13 gang’s base in El Salvador. In fact, MS-13 members in the U.S. often follow orders from gang leaders in the Central American nation.”
---
|

---

This year, a bipartisan majority in the New Hampshire legislature voted to repeal our antiquated death penalty law, as well as pass a Paid Family and Medical Leave bill. Both of these important pieces of legislations were met by a veto from the Governor.

Recently, friends, activists, and concerned citizens have reached out asking me about what they can do right now to make a difference. Here's what I suggest:

3. [**_Chip in $50, $25, or $10 today to help us keep fighting for New Hampshire families and children. _**](https://mollykelly.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db523bebb6ffbcad7e2109779&id=977b8680d7&e=6ad5a2afdb)

My very best,

Molly Kelly

name: Joe Biden
subject: About Trump's insult last night...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Yesterday, Donald Trump tried to attack me at his campaign rally by saying I abandoned Pennsylvania. | Peter --

Yesterday, Donald Trump tried to attack me at his campaign rally by saying I abandoned Pennsylvania.

Well Peter, I've never forgotten where I came from. **My family did have to leave Pennsylvania when I was 10 -- we moved to Delaware where my Dad found a job that could provide for our family.**

Let's be clear Peter: this isn't just about me. This is proof that Donald Trump doesn't understand the struggles working folks go through.

He doesn't understand what it's like to worry you will lose the roof over your head. He doesn't understand what it's like to wonder if you'll be able to put food on the table.

And he doesn't understand that the longest walk a parent can make is up a short flight of stairs to their child's bedroom to sit on the end of the bed and say, honey, I'm sorry. I'm so sorry. We have to move. You can't go back to your school. You won't see your friends. You can't play on that team. You can't be in the choir because Daddy lost his job or Mommy lost her job.

My dad had to make that walk in Scranton, Pennsylvania. It wasn't until I was older that I realized how hard it must have been for him.

But he was not alone. This story isn't unique to the Bidens. Too many people around this country have had to make that walk.

**That 's why I've spent my whole career fighting -- and I will continue to fight -- like hell so that no one ever has to make that walk again. **

I'm ready to keep fighting. And Peter, I hope I can count on you to be by my side. **If you 're with me, will you chip in to my campaign today?** | | [**$5**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319bc4/1cd0ac28/3da40172/356b5008/1649176472/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190521Pennsylvania-b2_FDR_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190521Pennsylvania&utm_content=b2_FDR_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1&amount=5")

clean_body: Yesterday, Donald Trump tried to attack me at his campaign rally by saying I abandoned Pennsylvania. | Peter -- Yesterday, Donald Trump tried to attack me at his campaign rally by saying I abandoned Pennsylvania. Well Peter, I've never forgotten where I came from. My family did have to leave Pennsylvania when I was 10 -- we moved to Delaware where my Dad found a job that could provide for our family. Let's be clear Peter: this isn't just about me. This is proof that Donald Trump doesn't understand the struggles working folks go through. He doesn't understand what it's like to worry you will lose the roof over your head. He doesn't understand what it's like to wonder if you'll be able to put food on the table. And he doesn't understand that the longest walk a parent can make is up a short flight of stairs to their child's bedroom to sit on the end of the bed and say, honey, I'm sorry. I'm so sorry. We have to move. You can't go back to your school. You won't see your friends. You can't play on that team. You can't be in the choir because Daddy lost his job or Mommy lost her job. My dad had to make that walk in Scranton, Pennsylvania. It wasn't until I was older that I realized how hard it must have been for him. But he was not alone. This story isn't unique to the Bidens. Too many people around this country have had to make that walk. That 's why I've spent my whole career fighting -- and I will continue to fight -- like hell so that no one ever has to make that walk again. I'm ready to keep fighting. And Peter, I hope I can count on you to be by my side. If you 're with me, will you chip in to my campaign today? | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks Peter. You are an important part of this campaign, Joe | "" "" "" ""

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I hope this guy wins in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek:

When I go to work each day, I'm focused on securing wider access to high quality, affordable health care, lowering prescription drug prices, fixing our campaign finance system, and supporting our farmers and rural communities.

It's an honor to do this work -- but it's hard going sometimes. Right now, there's a lot of important legislation we're having trouble getting through because of who controls the U.S. Senate. **The fact is, we need more Democrats in the Senate if we want to make forward progress. So I 'm writing today to tell you about someone I hope to serve with in 2021 -- a Black Hawk pilot and JAG attorney named James Mackler.**

James joined the U.S. Army after September 11th, 2001 because he felt like he had to do more in a time of crisis. As a 30-year-old lawyer, James closed his practice, earned an age waiver, learned to fly a Black Hawk, and became a Screaming Eagle serving in the 101st Airborne Division.

James is no stranger to tough fights -- so it's no surprise to me that now he's running to continue serving his country, and all Tennesseans, in the U.S. Senate.

[**Can you make an early investment to help this veteran join me and serve our country in the U.S. Senate?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1777/3e0906/7b3ded89/3e308dbe/2520643483/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-mackler?source=20190521_1_FR_TK_Mackler&amount=30&refcode=20190521_1_FR_TK_Mackler&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+make+an+early+investment+to+help&utm_campaign=20190521_1_FR_TK_Mackler")

Let me tell you a quick story about James: Wanting to reconnect with his Jewish faith following his deployment, he visited the closest synagogue to his military base. It was there that he found his future wife, Rabbi Shana Goldstein Mackler. They met and fell in love -- and James seldom misses Shabbat services anymore! James knows there are things more important than politics -- like family, duty, and faith -- and in today's polarized environment, we need more people like him in the U.S. Senate.

[**Help James grow his grassroots team with an early investment today.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1777/3e0906/7b3ded89/3e308dbd/2520643483/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-mackler?source=20190521_1_FR_TK_Mackler&amount=30&refcode=20190521_1_FR_TK_Mackler&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Help+James+grow+his+grassroots+team+with&utm_campaign=20190521_1_FR_TK_Mackler")

The more people like you who can help out now, the better our chances will be to win in Tennessee next November. Strong, early investments are what really make change happen -- so I'm asking you to step up today and be a part of that change.

Thanks so much,

-Tim

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd1c/3eb3e2fc/4f570f80/74498a55/1247440571/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190521_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")
---
I need to confess something to you:

I know perfectly well I'm not a frontrunner in this race.

But I wasn't born a frontrunner. I didn't grow up a frontrunner. _**And I know this country wasn 't built by frontrunners either.**_

It was built by families like yours and mine who toiled to achieve opportunity.

I'm working tirelessly to share my story in every Democratic primary debate, because it's your story, too -- and you deserve a voice speaking for you.

So we need to know: [**What concerns you most about Mitch McConnell 's Republican Senate? Dan needs to hear from 500 supporters so he can personally read and be inspired by your feedback. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826f8/232dfd1/9298a53/62a16335/1992931877/VEsF/ "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/mcconnell-senate-poll-all?source=20190521_em_pet_b1_reply_all") **NAME:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **Poll Response:** **[PENDING>>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826f8/232dfd1/9298a53/62a16335/1992931877/VEsC/ "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/mcconnell-senate-poll-all?source=20190521_em_pet_b1_reply_all")**
---

Last week, we saw the repercussions of Mitch McConnell's dangerous agenda in full force.

He had changed the Senate rules so Republicans could stack the courts with far-right judges with fewer votes, and has been approving lifetime confirmations at record speed.

The day before the anniversary of _Brown v. Board of Education_ , McConnell and Cory Gardner worked together to confirm Wendy Vitter to a judgeship. In her confirmation hearing, she refused to say whether _Brown v. Board of Education_ was rightly decided. Calling into question whether segregation is a good idea -- in 2019! -- that's where we are.

And the seat that Mitch McConnell stole from Merrick Garland on the Supreme Court, plus Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation, could very well be the reason _Roe v. Wade_ is overturned.

**Schemes like this are how Mitch McConnell and his Republican Senate will single handedly roll back decades of progress and undermine our democracy.**

There's a lot at stake. It's a big part of why Dan's campaign to flip this Colorado Senate seat is so important. So we need to know:

[**What concerns you the most about Mitch McConnell 's Republican Senate? Take our 1-Question poll and share your concerns with Dan. Your input is crucial to this campaign. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826f8/232dfd1/9298a53/62a16335/1992931877/VEsD/ "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/mcconnell-senate-poll-all?source=20190521_em_pet_b1_reply_all")

Thanks,

Team Baer

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I hope this guy wins in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
|
---

| | Friends, When I go to work each day, I'm focused on securing wider access to high quality, affordable health care, lowering prescription drug prices, fixing our campaign finance system, and supporting our farmers and rural communities. It's an honor to do this work -- but it's hard going sometimes. Right now, there's a lot of important legislation we're having trouble getting through because of who controls the U.S. Senate. **The fact is, we need more Democrats in the Senate if we want to make forward progress. So I 'm writing today to tell you about someone I hope to serve with in 2021 -- a Black Hawk pilot and JAG attorney named James Mackler.** James joined the U.S. Army after September 11th, 2001 because he felt like he had to do more in a time of crisis. As a 30-year-old lawyer, James closed his practice, earned an age waiver, learned to fly a Black Hawk, and became a Screaming Eagle serving in the 101st Airborne Division. James is no stranger to tough fights -- so it's no surprise to me that now he's running to continue serving his country, and all Tennesseans, in the U.S. Senate. [_**Can you make an early investment to help this veteran join me and serve our country in the U.S. Senate?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2ac/18d6a294/4a5d4fa3/26d690a6/718390312/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme190521?refcode=jme190521_m&recurring=true") Let me tell you a quick story about James: Wanting to reconnect with his Jewish faith following his deployment, he visited the closest synagogue to his military base. It was there that he found his future wife, Rabbi Shana Goldstein Mackler. They met and fell in love -- and James seldom misses Shabbat services anymore! James knows there are things more important than politics -- like family, duty, and faith -- and in today's polarized environment, we need more people like him in the U.S. Senate. | | Earlier this year, John Katko voted against the For The People Act, which would restore our democracy by protecting voting rights, reducing the influence of big money on our politics, and closing the ethical loopholes that allow corruption to thrive in Washington.

Taking big money out of politics isn't just the right thing to do, it's overwhelmingly popular with both Democratic and Republican voters.

That's why we are asking for your help to figure out why Katko voted against H.R. 1.

**Why do you think Representative Katko voted against the For the People Act?** **[D.C. leadership told him to](https://conole.bsd. Team Conole

body:

---
Climate change is an existential threat that we must confront _now._

To combat this global crisis as fast as possible, we must reignite America's ingenuity and entrepreneurial spirit in a shared mission.

Yesterday, Michael announced his proposal to significantly increase the protection of public lands, achieve 100% net-zero emissions by no later than 2050, and create a $1 trillion climate bank.
If enacted, his plan would:
* Commit the federal government to conserve 30% of America's land and oceans

* Create a vehicle for consumers to purchase 100% clean, net-zero emissions electricity from their power company

* Launch a 2030 Climate Challenge that spurs states to compete for federal infrastructure funding by aggressively reducing emissions

We must use every diplomatic and economic tool available to assert America's leadership in this critical fight.

We must do the hard work to build a diverse coalition here at home, and we can, once again, lead the world.

The American people have demanded urgent action to combat climate change but climate deniers continue to win this war. _Why?_

Because bought-and-paid-for politicians like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell put special interests ahead of our future.
[If you're a part of the majority of Americans who are ready to take on climate deniers, save our planet, and create millions of jobs in the process, add your name now!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba2e4/134673f2/3a158bc/6996ee88/3669574735/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/Climate-X-Option?source=EM_PET_B2_052119_AC&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

We must do the hard work to build a diverse coalition here at home, and we can, once again, lead the world. The American people have demanded urgent action to combat climate change but climate deniers continue to win this war. Why? Because bought-and-paid-for politicians like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell put special interests ahead of our future. "=" | "=" Forward together, Bennet for America | "" | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: We put Trump on defense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Donald Trump doesn't like what I said about him yesterday. Not one bit. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771629/691c9bd/6c0cf619/11a4ff63/1427987479/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-65kdonors?refcode=em_template")

| Heads up, friend: Donald Trump doesn't like what I said about him yesterday. Not one bit.

Yesterday, I gave a speech about my foreign policy and national security priorities, and when it came to Trump, I didn't hold back. I called him out for what he is: a willing Russian puppet, an isolationist, and a bully who has lowered our standing in the world.

**Those words hit a nerve --and just a few hours later, Donald Trump's campaign hit back**, releasing a laughable statement claiming that the Trump sanctions on Russia are "the toughest," that Trump "decimated" ISIS, and other bits of empty bluster and bravado. In short, typical Trump.

**Friend, we plan to keep Donald Trump on defense until we run him right out of the White House. Help us do it --rush a donation now to help us keep the pressure on and win.** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express your donation will go through right away._ [**_Donate $5 now_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771629/691c9bd/6c0cf619/11a4ff60/1427987479/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-security?refcode=em_fr_20190521_JH_20190521-fr-JH-trump-all_all_express5&amount=5&expresslane=true&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _Donate $10 now_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771629/691c9bd/6c0cf619/11a4ff61/1427987479/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-security?refcode=em_fr_20190521_JH_20190521-fr-JH-trump-all_all_express10&amount=10&expresslane=true&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _Donate $25 now_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771629/691c9bd/6c0cf619/11a4fc9e/1427987479/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-security?refcode=em_fr_20190521_JH_20190521-fr-JH-trump-all_all_express25&amount=25&expresslane=true&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _Donate $50 now_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771629/691c9bd/6c0cf619/11a4fc9f/1427987479/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-security?refcode=em_fr_20190521_JH_20190521-fr-JH-trump-all_all_express50&amount=50&expresslane=true&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _Donate $100 now_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771629/691c9bd/6c0cf619/11a4fc9c/1427987479/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-security?refcode=em_fr_20190521_JH_20190521-fr-JH-trump-all_all_express100&amount=100&expresslane=true&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=") The Trump campaign's attempt at hitting back shows me they see the substance and integrity that our campaign is bringing to this race and to the challenges facing our country--and they know Donald Trump can't handle it. Not one bit.

I'm ready to handle that bully--on a debate stage, in a general election, and anywhere else I need to.

[**_Help us continue to take on Trump with a donation now._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771629/691c9bd/6c0cf619/11a4fc9d/1427987479/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-security?refcode=em_fr_20190521_JH_20190521-fr-JH-trump-all_all_l1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771629/691c9bd/6c0cf619/11a4fc9a/1427987479/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-security?refcode=em_fr_20190521_JH_20190521-fr-JH-trump-all_all_contribbutton&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Cory Booker
subject: your $1 will help our Iowa team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, Last night, my team forwarded me this email in excitement over the progress we're making on the ground in Iowa. I'm passing this note along because I want you to know exactly where your money is going. We're not sugarcoating it in the emails my team sends you: every dollar helps us fund our grassroots operation. Your money goes to office rent, salaries, and supplies in key early states -- and it allows us to have real conversations with voters who will be the first ones to cast their votes in this election. [_**We have to keep up our momentum around the country. Can you chip in $1 to help our team fund this grassroots operation?**_](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190521-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190521_CB_20190521-fr-CB-iowaoffice-actives_actives_test2l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I'm heading to Iowa on Friday and can't wait to give Mike, our Iowa State Director, an update on how much we raised. So grateful for your support, Cory
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------_ _**From: Jenn Brown [Deputy Campaign Manager]**
Date: Mon, May 20, 2019 at 5:30 PM
Subject: Fwd: room in the Q2 budget?
To: Cory Booker_ Cory -- we're making moves in Iowa. Wanted to send you a reminder of how important our grassroots operation is, and how seriously we're taking every dollar raised. Excited to have you hit the road in Iowa this weekend! :)
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------_ _**From: Mike Frosolone [Iowa State Director]**
Date: Mon, May 20, 2019 at 5:30 PM
Subject: room in the Q2 budget?
To: Jenn Brown [Deputy Campaign Manager]_ Hey, Jenn -- we need $1,950 for supplies in our Des Moines office. We also have 9 new organizers coming on board so they need to be added to payroll. Also, we found a lead on a new office in IA -- I'll keep you updated. Is all of this possible in the Q2 budget? Super pumped to have Cory here this weekend. Thanks, Mike
---

---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0962/5fca0d19/1724cff/291b13de/4169044222/VEsF/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0962/5fca0d19/1724cff/291b13dd/4169044222/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0962/5fca0d19/1724cff/291b13dc/4169044222/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0962/5fca0d19/1724cff/291b13db/4169044222/VEsA/ "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
